_README: Seed file. Fill in concrete subreddits, channel ids, and FB groups before flipping social_outreach_enabled=true. Suggested first-night reddit targets in the comments below.

youtube._README: monitored_videos = canonical youtube.com/watch?v=<id> URLs whose comment sections should be scanned for new replies to Guaardvark. scout_youtube_my_video_replies iterates these on each tick.
